name: What is an attention mechanism?
snippet: An attention mechanism is a machine learning technique that directs deep learning models to prioritize (or attend to) the most relevant parts of input data.

name: Attention (machine learning)
snippet: In machine learning, attention is a method that determines the importance of each component in a sequence relative to the other components in that sequence.
